name: Automated Expense Management - MOCK AI (Google Sheets Integration Test)

parameters.content:
MOCK AI variant of the main workflow.

The LLM HTTP call has been replaced with a Code node that returns a hardcoded, valid receipt — so this workflow exercises only the Google Sheets + Discord + Mongo integration path, with no LLM API key, billing, or network dependency required.

Webhook path is /webhook/expense-submission-mock
(so it does not collide with the real workflow).

To trigger different branches, override fields in the Discord bot's POST body:
  mockScenario: "approved" (default) | "pending" | "rejected" | "unavailable" | "sheetfail" | "sheetfail-pending"

Expected POST body from your Discord bot:
{
  "discordUser": "Paul Krus",
  "discordUserId": "123456789",
  "messageTimestamp": "2026-05-25T14:14:34.000Z",
  "submittedDate": "2026-05-25",
  "messageId": "discord-message-id",
  "channelId": "discord-channel-id",
  "imageBase64": "<can be empty in mock mode>",
  "mimeType": "image/jpeg",
  "mockScenario": "approved"
}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ ({ ok: false, status: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.status, event: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.logEvent, details: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.details }) }}

={{ ({ ok: false, status: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.status, event: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.logEvent, details: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.details }) }}

value.label: info
value.details: =[MOCK] Appended row to Receipts as Pending Review. Range: {{ $json.updates?.updatedRange || $json.tableRange || 'unknown' }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ ({ ok: true, mock: true, status: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.status, event: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.logEvent, details: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.details, missingFields: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.missingFields }) }}

value.label: info
value.details: =[MOCK] Appended row to Receipts as Approved by Bot. Range: {{ $json.updates?.updatedRange || $json.tableRange || 'unknown' }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ ({ ok: true, mock: true, status: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.status, event: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.logEvent, details: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.details }) }}

parameters.content:
Mock-mode notes:

No LLM env vars are needed for this workflow (LLM_BASE_URL / LLM_API_KEY / LLM_MODEL are unused).

Still required:
  GOOGLE_SHEETS_SPREADSHEET_ID
  DISCORD_LOG_WEBHOOK_URL
  MongoDB credential in n8n: mongodb://admin:password@mongo:27017/expense_rpa?authSource=admin
  Google Sheets credential (reattach 'Google Sheets OAuth2' on both Sheets Append nodes)

Sheet columns (Receipts tab — Sheets Append nodes map by header name):
Employee Name | Submitted Date | Message Timestamp | Receipt Date | Merchant
| Expense Category | Payment Method | Currency
| Total Amount | VAT Included | VAT Amount | Status

Log event taxonomy (see Mongo `logs` collection):
  SubmissionReceived    (info)
  AIExtractionRequested (info)
  AIUnavailable         (error)
  AIResponseInvalid     (error)
  AIResponseReceived    (info)
  NoReceiptDetected     (warning)
  MissingRequiredFields (warning)
  SheetAppendSucceeded  (info)
  SheetAppendFailed     (error)
  WorkflowCompleted     (info)

Document shape per log (enforced by the logging subworkflow):
  label, event, logTimestamp, messageId,
  discordUser, messageTimestamp, details,
  N8NStackTrace (only on errors)

IMPORTANT: Import the Logging Subworkflow first,
then replace Pg6WVXXoo0lun2yr in every Log - * node
with its workflow ID from the n8n URL.

Quick smoke test (approved path):
curl -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/expense-submission-mock \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"discordUser":"Test","discordUserId":"1","messageTimestamp":"2026-05-28T10:00:00.000Z","submittedDate":"2026-05-28","mockScenario":"approved"}'

Sheet-write failure test — Approved path (no real Sheets call made):
curl -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/expense-submission-mock \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"discordUser":"Test","discordUserId":"1","messageTimestamp":"2026-05-28T10:00:00.000Z","submittedDate":"2026-05-28","mockScenario":"sheetfail"}'

Sheet-write failure test — Pending path (no real Sheets call made):
curl -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/expense-submission-mock \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"discordUser":"Test","discordUserId":"1","messageTimestamp":"2026-05-28T10:00:00.000Z","submittedDate":"2026-05-28","mockScenario":"sheetfail-pending"}'

value.label: error

meta.description: Mock-AI variant of the AccountantBot workflow. The LLM HTTP call is replaced with a Code node that returns a hardcoded receipt, so the workflow exercises only the Google Sheets, Discord, and MongoDB logging integrations.
